responses.response: Hi there! This is a demo chat interface. No actual AI API key is integrated — responses are served from local sample data to showcase the streaming UI and chat functionality.

This is a demo-only chat feature. In a production environment, you would connect an AI provider (OpenAI or Anthropic) via Supabase Edge Functions. Currently, no AI token is configured — this interface demonstrates the chat UX, threading, and streaming patterns.

Thanks for trying the chat demo! This response is served from a local JSON fixture. To enable real AI responses, configure AI_PROVIDER, AI_MODEL, and the corresponding API key in your Supabase Edge Function secrets.
